shortDescription: A simple timer that helps you build and follow timed stretch routines without overthinking it.
longDescription:
Stretch Interval Timer helps you build and follow timed stretch routines without overthinking it.

Set up your holds and rests, hit start, and the app guides you through each step with clear cues—so you can stay in the stretch instead of watching the clock.

Works for morning routines, cool-downs, or anything in between. Left and right sides, repeats, and sound or haptic cues when you want them.

No fluff. Just a simple timer that keeps your stretching consistent.
